ddls:
CREATE TABLE "soil_pedons" (
  "pedon_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each pedon sample */,
  "musym" INTEGER /* Musym number for the pedon */,
  "taxonname" TEXT /* Taxonomic name of the soil */,
  "taxon_kind" TEXT /* Kind of taxonomic classification */,
  "pedon_type" TEXT /* Type of pedon observation */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the soil sample */,
  "depth_class" TEXT /* Class of depth (e.g., deep, shallow) */,
  "part_size_class" TEXT /* Class of particle size (e.g., sandy-skeletal, loamy-skeletal) */,
  "tax_subgroup" TEXT /* Subgroup of the taxonomic classification */,
  "missing_genhz" TEXT /* Indication of any missing genetic horizon data */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the soil sample was collected */,
  "sample_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the soil sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who collected the soil sample */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Current status of the soil sample analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the soil pedon record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_depth_class FOREIGN KEY ("depth_class") REFERENCES depth_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_pedon_type FOREIGN KEY ("pedon_type") REFERENCES pedon_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_taxonname FOREIGN KEY ("taxonname") REFERENCES taxonomic_classifications ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_tax_subgroup FOREIGN KEY ("tax_subgroup") REFERENCES taxonomic_subgroups ("subgroup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_musym FOREIGN KEY ("musym") REFERENCES musyms ("musym"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_part_size_class FOREIGN KEY ("part_size_class") REFERENCES particle_size_classes ("size_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_sample_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_pedons_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "musyms" (
  "musym" INTEGER /* Musym number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or meaning of the musym */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the musym entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("musym")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_classifications" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic classification */,
  "taxonname" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic classification */,
  "taxon_kind" TEXT /* Kind of the taxonomic classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomic classification */,
  "parent_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxonomic classification */,
  "taxon_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedon type */,
  "pedon_type" TEXT /* Type of pedon observation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pedon type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depth_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth class */,
  "depth_class" TEXT /* Class of depth (e.g., deep, shallow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the depth class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the depth class entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "particle_size_classes" (
  "size_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each particle size class */,
  "part_size_class" TEXT /* Class of particle size (e.g., sandy-skeletal, loamy-skeletal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the particle size class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the particle size class entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_subgroups" (
  "subgroup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic subgroup */,
  "tax_subgroup" TEXT /* Subgroup of the taxonomic classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomic subgroup */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the taxonomic subgroup entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subgroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indication of whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pedon_id" TEXT /* ID of the soil pedon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the soil pedon */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the soil pedon was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the soil pedon data */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pedon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pedon_id") REFERENCES soil_pedons ("pedon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "pedon_id" TEXT /* ID of the soil pedon record being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date and time the revision was made */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_revised_by FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_pedon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pedon_id") REFERENCES soil_pedons ("pedon_id")
)
